LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmNATO_FMJ.label: 7.62x51mm NATO (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmNATO_FMJ.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles, and various other infantry weapons.
